blocks.name: Electrodialysis
blocks.description: Ion transport diluate→concentrate under a DC field (cell-pair model).

blocks.name: Electrodeionization
blocks.description: Electrodialysis plus ion-exchange resin for deep deionization.

blocks.name: Capacitive Deionization
blocks.description: Cycle-averaged electrosorption of salt onto porous electrodes.

blocks.name: Chlor-Alkali Membrane Cell
blocks.description: Brine electrolysis to Cl2, NaOH and H2 (Faradaic).

blocks.name: Ion Exchange Column
blocks.description: Fixed-bed removal of a target ion (softening / selective capture).
